reviews.comment:
El dia de ayer fui a esta estación de servicio estacione mi auto y el personal de MURATA me dijo, de mala manera, que tenia que retirar mi auto porque no se podía estacionar (??). Le dije que tenia que comprar unas cosas en una farmacia  -puesto que la estación de servicio no los vende- y luego comprar cosas en la estación de servicio y cargar combustible. A pesar de eso, el personal de MURATA seguía insistiendo que debía sacar el auto de mala manera. Intenten contratar gente un poco mas profesional o al menos con algo de sentido común.

(Translated by Google)
Yesterday I went to this gas station, parked my car, and the Murata staff rudely told me I had to move my car because it wasn't allowed to be parked there (??). I told them I needed to buy some things at a pharmacy—since the gas station doesn't sell them—and then buy some things at the gas station and fill up with gas. Despite that, the Murata staff kept insisting I move the car, and they were rude. Try hiring people who are a bit more professional or at least have some common sense.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xSTGJFVlFhV2N5Y0ROUlpUZERlSHB3WkZOSU1rRRAB
